places.name: Mahakali Caves
places.description: Nineteen ancient rock-cut Buddhist caves can be found on the outskirts of Mumbai.

places.name: Tower of Silence in Mumbai
places.description: A Zoroastrian funerary tower where excarnation rituals are carried out is threatened by the area's dwindling vulture population.

places.name: The Magen David Synagogue
places.description: In Mumbai, a bright blue synagogue is the largest one for the Baghdadi Jewish community in Asia.

places.name: Gilbert Hill
places.description: A 66-million-year-old rock formation stands tall over Mumbai, offering stellar city views.

places.name: Banganga Tank
places.description: Tucked in Mumbai’s wealthiest neighborhood is one of the city’s oldest and most sacred sites: a temple complex believed to house the waters of the Ganges.

places.name: Kwan Kung Temple
places.description: The only Chinese temple in Mumbai.
